hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, after a strong ATR-scaled momentum impulse (1.5*ATR move in 5 bars), a shallow pullback to EMA(20) resumes the trend; EMA50>EMA200 (or inverse) gates direction.

entry_rules.long: ema_50 > ema_200 AND (high[5] - low[5..1].min) impulse >= 1.5*ATR14 AND close crosses back above ema_20 from below within 10 bars of impulse
entry_rules.short: ema_50 < ema_200 AND inverse impulse AND close crosses below ema_20 from above within 10 bars
entry_rules.simplified_alt: If 'crosses back' plumbing is fragile: use close > ema_20 AND low[1] <= ema_20[1] (touch-and-hold) as entry trigger.

regime_filter.comment: Mild trend filter; not stacked with ATR percentile.

session_filter.comment: London + NY overlap where gold M5 momentum is cleanest.
